chunks.text: CF 2 DOF structure with small PZT actuators. Various movies of the wing motion showing a problem with self-resonance at around 600Hz. The movie of the wing motion where 40Vpp is given to just the lead actuator at 650Hz is especially telling. wing_mot

actuator at 650Hz is especially telling. wing_motion_lead_40Vpp_200Hz.mpg wing_motion_lag_40Vpp_200Hz.mpg wing_motion_lead_40Vpp_600Hz.mpg wing_motion_lag_40Vpp_600Hz.mpg wing_motion_lead_40Vpp_650Hz.mpg wing_motion_lag_40Vpp_650Hz.mpg Photos: 03-mu
